title: Add Fact
reputationNotice: Reporting a fact requires at least 100 reputation points. Your current score: {{score}}. Write reviews and stay active in the community to earn points.

lowReputation.title: Insufficient Reputation
lowReputation.message: You need at least 100 reputation points to add a fact. You can earn reputation by writing reviews.

warning: Unlike subjective opinions, facts must be objectively verifiable.

statement.label: Fact Statement
statement.placeholder: State the fact clearly and concisely...
statement.placeholderWeb: Enter a verifiable fact (at least 20 characters)

truthGuarantee.label: I guarantee this information is true to the best of my knowledge
truthGuarantee.labelWeb: I attest that this information is true
truthGuarantee.warning: Reporting false information may affect your reputation score

validation.minLength: The fact must be at least 20 characters
validation.guaranteeRequired: You must confirm the accuracy guarantee

success.title: Success
success.message: Your fact report has been submitted! It will await community verification.

error.lowReputation: You don't have enough reputation to report a fact (at least 100 points required).
error.generic: Could not submit the fact report. Please try again.
